name: Control D Utility
description: DNS/network control utility GUI app — companion to ctrld CLI daemon

changelog.note: Changelog from CLI daemon releases on GitHub

notes: The GUI app auto-updates with no public Sparkle feed or version endpoint. The controld.com website is Cloudflare-protected (404 to automated fetchers). No Mac App Store — web-only distribution. The CLI daemon (ctrld) is open-source on GitHub with proper release versioning. Mapping GUI version to CLI version is approximate.
